metadata.use_case:
I need help designing a schema for analyzing public comments submitted to a federal regulatory docket regarding medical payment products (medical credit cards and loans). These comments were submitted in response to a joint Request for Information (RFI) from the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), and Department of the Treasury.

The comments come from diverse stakeholders:
- Individual patients sharing personal experiences with medical cre

Representative Experience Quote: United Credit is proud to be your partner and support your business growth through a financing option that helps consumers get the services and products they need.
Cared Credit helped me cover almost $5000 worth of surgeries and treatments for my Boxer.
I chose Care Credit for the option of a fixed payment.
Policy Recommendation Snippet: Read the fine print and use the product(s) appropriately.

Representative Experience Quote: Have no support to make a good or informed decision (most Americans are not financially proficient and are even worse under stress).
Policy Recommendation Snippet: I hope that any proposed and final regulations prioritize the needs and actions of actual people.
